name: Smokey Hormel
description: American guitarist; session guitarist for Beck, Tom Waits
abstract: Smokey Hormel (born circa 1959) is an American guitarist known for his blues-influenced Americana style and working as a session musician with a wide array of performers.

concerts.label: The Music of Paul McCartney
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

works.t: With a Little Help from My Friends

about_quotes.speaker: Putter Smith
about_quotes.evidence: Because I like him so much, he was such a great guy. ... So anyway Smokey is a friend of Beck.
about_quotes.doc_title: Putter Smith interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 27, 2024
